How PhoneHowTo works

This page outlines how we test products, cite sources, and keep shopping fields current. When we use affiliate links, we may earn a commission; that does not change the price you pay. See the affiliate disclosure and contact us if you spot something that looks out of date.

Our review process

  • Step 1

    Every how-to is written against a physical device or the exact OS version named in the title — we re-check steps after major iOS and One UI updates.

  • Step 2

    Screenshots and menu paths use the on-device labels readers will see, not generic Android/iOS jargon.

  • Step 3

    Battery and troubleshooting guides list what we ruled out before recommending a reset or repair.

  • Step 4

    Review articles disclose purchase source, test duration, and carrier/SIM context.

  • Step 5

    Affiliate links are limited to cases, chargers, and storage tools we actually use in testing.

  • Step 6

    Reader corrections on wrong menu paths are fixed within 72 hours with a dated changelog line.

PhoneHowTo

Model-specific how-tos for iPhone, Galaxy, Pixel, and Motorola. Screenshots, backups, battery drain, storage full, frozen screen, transfer to a new phone — no fluff, no 12-minute intro.
